text: There is a subtle unease as I move from one space to another—a transition from the soft quietness of an almost-empty hall, to the stimulating glow of a gallery wall filled with ideas about technology and humanity. Here, I am confronted by the abstraction of research and innovation, prompting me to meditate on the ever-shifting boundary between myself and the intelligent machines we create. I feel inquisitive, slightly out of place, but also awakened to questions about my own participation in shaping the future.
